meaning: n.粗糙,粗暴,未加工,粗糙程度
examples: She rested her cheek against the roughness of his jacket.
But you will not mind the roughness nor the steepness of the way.
The roughness of the world.He guards the sleep of his pauper master as if he.
The new material can change between two states when stretched, altering both its transparency and its roughness.
Any player guilty of starting a fight or of excessive roughness is thrown out of the game.
